content.text: I want to convert a deeply nested dictionary structure into a format that prints more cleanly, specifically replacing all standard dictionaries with my custom `PrettyDict` class.
Wait, if this function encounters a list of dictionaries, does it convert each one individually?

Yes, because `x` iterates over elements and applies recursion to every value. For example, in your provided code snippet, when checking sequences, the line `_recursively_replace_dict_for_pretty_dict(x_) for x_ in x` ensures every item is processed.
Got it, thanks for clearing that up!
